description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific network.

fields.name: vlanId
fields.description: VLAN ID. Must be 1 for the default network and >= 2 for additional networks.

fields.name: metadata
fields.type: object (User or system defined or orchestrated entity metadata)
fields.description: Orchestrated or System-defined configurable network support

fields.name: dhcpGuarding
fields.description: DHCP Guarding settings for this Network. If this field is omitted or null, the feature is disabled

children.name: trustedDhcpServerIpAddresses
children.description: List of trusted DHCP server IP addresses.

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get Network Details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get Network Details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/networks/{networkId}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
